steps.title: Use the study result
steps.content: Participants perceived a broken line as continuous even though part of it was blocked from view. The blank must describe the brain making up for incomplete visual information by filling in what is missing.

steps.title: Choose the precise verb
steps.content: A means to fascinate, which does not fit a cognitive process. B means to return to an earlier state. C means to block, contradicting the brain's filling-in action. The needed verb means to make up for something lacking. The answer is D.
